aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Fusion Heating & Cooling due to limited conversational content and missing FAQ data. They have potential but need optimization for AI visibility.
quick_wins: Add structured FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.
Implement HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies in future.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema details (e.g., address, phone, geo coordinates).
No FAQPage schema for common customer questions.
No HowTo schema for HVAC maintenance or repair guidance.
Missing Service schema to highlight specific HVAC services.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data prevents AI models from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Arvada' or 'best AC installation near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by creating detailed content on regional HVAC challenges and solutions.

agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ content and structured data, which are critical for AI recognition.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement targeted AEO strategies, including FAQ content, schema markup, and conversational content, to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimized for AI are already capturing market share. Act now to stay competitive.
